tasks.title: Create format crate Cargo.toml
tasks.description: Create `crates/format/Cargo.toml` with dependencies for format service including tokio, serde, tracing, etc.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Cargo.toml parses correctly
AddRegressionTest: ensure all declared dependencies are valid crates.io packages
tasks.impl_notes: Use workspace dependencies where possible. Follow existing crate patterns in crates/core

tasks.title: Create format crate lib.rs with module exports
tasks.description: Create `crates/format/src/lib.rs` with module exports for FormatService, formatters, config, and error types
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify all public modules are exported
AddIntegrationTest: verify lib.rs exports are accessible from other crates
tasks.impl_notes: Follow existing lib.rs patterns in other crates

tasks.title: Create FormatService in service.rs
tasks.description: Create `crates/format/src/service.rs` implementing FormatService with init(), status(), file() methods and Effect/Layer integration
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify FormatService initializes without error
AddUnitTest: verify init() returns success result
AddIntegrationTest: verify FormatService integrates with Effect/Layer
tasks.impl_notes: Use Effect/Layer pattern for dependency injection. Include proper error handling

tasks.title: Create formatters.rs with built-in formatters
tasks.description: Create `crates/format/src/formatters.rs` with all 25+ built-in formatters: gofmt, mix, prettier, oxfmt, biome, zig, clang-format, ktlint, ruff, uvformat, air, rubocop, standardrb, htmlbeautifier, dart, ocamlformat, terraform, latexindent, gleam, shfmt, nixfmt, rustfmt, pint, ormolu, cljfmt, dfmt
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify each formatter has correct name and extensions
AddUnitTest: verify formatter detection logic for gofmt
AddUnitTest: verify formatter detection logic for rustfmt
AddRegressionTest: ensure all 25+ formatters are defined
tasks.impl_notes: Each formatter must implement Formatter trait with name(), extensions(), environment(), enabled() methods

tasks.title: Create config.rs for config integration
tasks.description: Create `crates/format/src/config.rs` for integration with existing config system. Support formatter: true/false, disabled formatters list, per-formatter settings
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify config parsing for formatter: true
AddUnitTest: verify config parsing for formatter: false
AddUnitTest: verify disabled formatters list is parsed correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Integrate with existing config.rs patterns in core

tasks.title: Define FormatterStatus struct
tasks.description: Define FormatterStatus struct with fields: name, extensions, enabled. Used for status() API response
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify FormatterStatus struct creation with name, extensions, enabled
AddUnitTest: verify FormatterStatus serialization to JSON
tasks.impl_notes: Use serde derive macros for JSON serialization

tasks.title: Define FormatterContext struct
tasks.description: Define FormatterContext struct with fields: directory, worktree. Passed to formatters to determine context
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify FormatterContext struct creation
AddUnitTest: verify directory and worktree fields are accessible

tasks.title: Define Formatter trait
tasks.description: Define Formatter trait with required methods: name() -> String, extensions() -> Vec<&str>, environment() -> Option<HashMap<String,String>>, enabled(ctx: &FormatterContext) -> bool
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Formatter trait is object-safe
AddUnitTest: verify trait methods are implemented for sample formatter
AddUnitTest: verify trait objects can be stored in Vec
AddUnitTest: verify async enabled method works for sample formatter
tasks.impl_notes: Consider using async_trait if formatters may need async operations

tasks.title: Implement status() returning Vec<FormatterStatus>
tasks.description: Implement status() method on FormatService that returns Vec<FormatterStatus> for all enabled formatters
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify status() returns empty list when formatter: false
AddUnitTest: verify status() returns all 25+ formatters when formatter: true
AddUnitTest: verify status() excludes formatters marked disabled: true
AddIntegrationTest: verify status() output matches TypeScript status() returns empty list when no formatters
tasks.impl_notes: status() should reflect current config state including disabled list

tasks.title: Implement gofmt formatter (.go)
tasks.description: Implement gofmt formatter for .go files. Detection: `which gofmt`. Extensions: .go
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify gofmt name returns 'gofmt'
AddUnitTest: verify gofmt extensions includes '.go'
AddUnitTest: verify gofmt enabled() checks which gofmt
tasks.impl_notes: Use which crate or Command::new("which") for binary detection

tasks.title: Implement mix formatter (.ex,.exs,.eex,.heex)
tasks.description: Implement mix formatter for Elixir files. Detection: `which mix`. Extensions: .ex, .exs, .eex, .heex
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify mix name returns 'mix'
AddUnitTest: verify mix extensions includes all Elixir extensions
AddUnitTest: verify mix enabled() checks which mix

tasks.title: Implement prettier formatter (.js,.ts,.html,.css,.json,.yaml,.md,...)
tasks.description: Implement prettier formatter for web languages. Detection: package.json has prettier dep. Extensions: .js, .ts, .html, .css, .json, .yaml, .md, and more
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify prettier name returns 'prettier'
AddUnitTest: verify prettier extensions includes common web extensions
AddUnitTest: verify prettier enabled() checks package.json for prettier dependency

tasks.title: Implement oxfmt formatter (.js,.ts,...)
tasks.description: Implement oxfmt formatter (OpenCode experimental). Detection: OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_OXFMT flag + package.json has oxfmt
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify oxfmt name returns 'oxfmt'
AddUnitTest: verify oxfmt enabled() checks OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_OXFMT env var and package.json
tasks.impl_notes: Only enabled when experimental flag is set

tasks.title: Implement biome formatter (.js,.ts,.html,.css,...)
tasks.description: Implement biome formatter. Detection: biome.json config + @biomejs/biome. Extensions: .js, .ts, .html, .css, and more
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify biome name returns 'biome'
AddUnitTest: verify biome extensions includes common web extensions
AddUnitTest: verify biome enabled() checks for biome.json and @biomejs/biome
tasks.impl_notes: Biome is a modern linter/formatter for web languages

tasks.title: Implement zig formatter (.zig,.zon)
tasks.description: Implement zig formatter. Detection: `which zig`. Extensions: .zig, .zon

AddUnitTest: verify zig extensions includes .zig and .zon
AddUnitTest: verify zig enabled() checks which zig

tasks.title: Implement clang-format formatter (.c,.cc,.cpp,.h,...)
tasks.description: Implement clang-format formatter for C/C++. Detection: .clang-format config file. Extensions: .c, .cc, .cpp, .h, .hpp, and more

AddUnitTest: verify clang-format extensions includes C/C++ extensions

AddUnitTest: verify uvformat extensions includes .py and .pyi
AddUnitTest: verify uvformat enabled() checks which uv

tasks.title: Implement ruff/uv linked disabling
tasks.description: When ruff is disabled, also disable uv. When uv is disabled, also disable ruff. Add tests for linked disabling
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify disabling ruff removes uv from status()
AddUnitTest: verify disabling uv removes ruff from status()
AddIntegrationTest: verify config_object_keeps_all_builtins with linked formatters
tasks.impl_notes: Implement mutual dependency between ruff and uv formatters

tasks.title: Integrate FormatService with InstanceState
tasks.description: Integrate FormatService with InstanceState. Implement per-directory formatter state scoping
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify FormatService uses InstanceState for configuration
AddUnitTest: verify formatter state is scoped per directory
AddIntegrationTest: verify formatter_state_isolated_per_directory
tasks.impl_notes: Each directory may have different formatter configurations

tasks.title: Implement parallel enabled() checks with tokio::join!
tasks.description: Use tokio::join! for parallel availability checks. Verify formatter availability in parallel
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify enabled_checks_run_in_parallel using tokio::join!
AddRegressionTest: ensure parallel checks produce same results as sequential
tasks.impl_notes: Use tokio::join! to check multiple formatters concurrently

tasks.title: Unify glob pattern matching
tasks.description: Port glob pattern support from formatter.rs to formatter_hook.rs. Remove duplicate extension matching logic
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify glob patterns work consistently across formatter modules
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing extension matching still works after refactor
tasks.impl_notes: Remove code duplication between formatter.rs and formatter_hook.rs

tasks.title: Extract hardcoded Duration::from_secs(10) to constant
tasks.description: Extract hardcoded Duration::from_secs(10) to a named constant for timeout configuration
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure timeout behavior unchanged after constant extraction
AddUnitTest: verify constant is properly defined and used

tasks.title: Add formatter name to success log
tasks.description: Add formatter name to success log messages for better observability
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure log output includes formatter name
tasks.impl_notes: Include formatter name in log statements

tasks.title: Add tracing spans for observability
tasks.description: Add tracing spans for observability in FormatService and formatter execution
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure tracing spans are properly created
AddIntegrationTest: verify tracing output in formatted output
tasks.impl_notes: Use tracing crate for structured logging

tasks.title: Implement status_empty_when_disabled integration test
tasks.description: Add integration test: status() returns empty list when formatter: false
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify status() returns empty list when formatter: false

tasks.description: Add integration test: status() returns built-in formatters when formatter is true
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify status() includes gofmt when formatter: true

tasks.title: Implement status_excludes_disabled_formatter integration test
tasks.description: Add integration test: status() excludes formatters marked as disabled
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify status() excludes formatters marked as disabled

tasks.description: Add integration test: matching formatters run sequentially for the same file
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify multiple matching formatters run sequentially not in parallel

tasks.title: Implement formatter_state_isolated_per_directory integration test
tasks.description: Add integration test: formatter state isolated per directory
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify formatter state is isolated per directory

tasks.title: Implement enabled_checks_run_in_parallel integration test
tasks.description: Add integration test: enabled checks run in parallel

tasks.title: Implement file_placeholder_substituted integration test
tasks.description: Add integration test: file placeholder is substituted correctly in formatter commands
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify file placeholder {} is substituted with actual file path
tasks.impl_notes: Verify formatter receives correct file path

tasks.title: Implement failed_formatter_does_not_panic integration test
tasks.description: Add integration test: failed formatter does not panic the system
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify formatter failure returns error not panic
AddRegressionTest: ensure system remains stable when formatter fails
